fields.name: sftpHost
fields.whyRequired: Inbound legacy project archives / outbound exports are exchanged with banking systems over SFTP.

fields.name: sftpPort
fields.whyRequired: Standard SSH/SFTP port; confirm any non-default port the operator uses.
fields.expectedSuccessfulOutput: TcpTestSucceeded = True on the configured port.

fields.name: sftpHostKeyFingerprint
fields.whyRequired: The server host-key fingerprint must be pinned to prevent man-in-the-middle on first connect.
fields.expectedSuccessfulOutput: Reported fingerprint matches the pinned SHA256 fingerprint exactly.

fields.name: sftpClientKeyReference
fields.exampleValue: vault://example-kv/secrets/laf-sftp-private-key#latest (REFERENCE ONLY — private key never in repo)
fields.whyRequired: Key-based authentication is required; the private key is held in the vault and referenced at runtime.
fields.validationCommand: Resolve the key reference from the vault into the service account's key agent, then: sftp -i <resolved-key> svc-laf@sftp.example.local
fields.expectedSuccessfulOutput: SFTP session authenticates with the key; no password prompt; private key absent from repo and logs.
